content: 0603号的打分这批，mob4dpd30统计的里面包括1001日due的所有bills吗？例如包含0906日发放的一个loan在1001日due的bill的表现情况吗

payload.content: 0603号的打分这批，mob4dpd30统计的里面包括1001日due的所有bills吗？例如包含0906日发放的一个loan在1001日due的bill的表现情况吗

content:
我当前sql是这样的：

```SQL
-- script-mode
SET odps.sql.submit.mode=script;
SET odps.sql.bigquery.compatible=true;
SET odps.sql.allow.cartesian=true;
SET odps.sql.groupby.orderby.position.alias=true;
SET odps.sql.allow.fullscan=true;


with base_user_org AS (
  SELECT
    pid
    , TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(score_timestamp_ts, 'Asia/Jakarta')) AS score_date
    , TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 'Asia/Jakarta')) AS current_jkt_date
    , DATEADD(DATETRUNC(TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(score_timestamp_ts, 'Asia/Jakarta')), 'mm'), 1, 'mm') AS first_due_date
    , DATEADD(DATETRUNC(TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(score_timestamp_ts, 'Asia/Jakarta')), 'mm'), 2, 'mm') AS second_due_date
    , DATEADD(DATETRUNC(TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(score_timestamp_ts, 'Asia/Jakarta')), 'mm'), 3, 'mm') AS third_due_date
    , DATEADD(DATETRUNC(TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(score_timestamp_ts, 'Asia/Jakarta')), 'mm'), 4, 'mm') AS fourth_due_date
    , user_id
    , hashed_ic_number
    , CASE WHEN mature_flag = 1 THEN 'Mature'
      WHEN young_flag = 1 THEN 'Young'
      WHEN ant_flag = 1 THEN 'ANT'
      WHEN current_dpd_flag = 1 THEN 'Current_DPD'
      WHEN dormant_flag = 1 THEN 'Dormant'
      END AS user_segment
    , score
    , proba
    , mature_internal_proba
    , young_internal_proba
    , current_dpd_internal_proba
    , dormant_internal_proba
    , external_proba
    , fdc_proba
    , gopay_proba
    , mgr_proba
  FROM p_mab_id_ds_prd.customer_risk.m_cicil_b_score_v3 a
  WHERE 
  _partition_value <= '2026-01-03' --DATEADD(date('{EXECUTION_DATE}'), -2, 'dd')
)

--抽取了10%的样本
,base_user as (
select
*
FROM 
    (
    SELECT
    *
    ,row_number() OVER (
                        PARTITION BY score_date, user_segment
                        ORDER BY rand(123) desc
                        ) AS rn

    ,count(1) OVER (
                    PARTITION BY score_date, user_segment
                   ) AS cnt
    FROM base_user_org
    ) r
WHERE 
rn <= cnt * 0.1
)

, subscores AS ( --base_user
SELECT pid
, CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_mature_internal_proba)/cap_mature_internal_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS mature_internal_subscore
, CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_young_internal_proba)/cap_young_internal_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS young_internal_subscore
, CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_current_dpd_internal_proba)/cap_current_dpd_internal_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS current_dpd_internal_subscore
, CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_dormant_internal_proba)/cap_dormant_internal_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS dormant_internal_subscore
, CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_external_proba)/cap_external_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS external_subscore
, CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_fdc_proba)/cap_fdc_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS fdc_subscore
, CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_mgr_proba)/cap_mgr_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS mgr_subscore
, CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_gopay_proba)/cap_gopay_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS gopay_subscore
FROM    (
        SELECT pid
            , LEAST(GREATEST(mature_internal_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_mature_internal_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(young_internal_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_young_internal_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(current_dpd_internal_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_current_dpd_internal_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(dormant_internal_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_dormant_internal_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(external_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_external_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(fdc_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_fdc_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(mgr_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_mgr_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(gopay_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_gopay_proba
        FROM base_user
        ) r
)

, bill_tracking AS (
    SELECT * EXCEPT (maximum_overdue_days_number)
          , CASE WHEN status_name = 'OVERDUE' THEN
        GREATEST(
            datediff(
                     TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 'Asia/Jakarta')),
                    TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(effective_due_timestamp, 'Asia/Jakarta'))
              ,'dd')
          , 0
        ) ELSE maximum_overdue_days_number END AS maximum_overdue_days_number
    FROM p_mab_id_mart.risk.detail_gtf_bill_tracking
  )

```


```SQL
, gpl_due_bill AS (
    SELECT user_id
         , TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(effective_due_timestamp, 'Asia/Jakarta'))      AS due_date
         , maximum_overdue_days_number  AS over_due_days
         , due_principal_amount AS bill_principal
         , status_name    AS bill_status
         , installment_number
         , created_jkt_date
    FROM bill_tracking l
    WHERE 1 = 1
      AND platform_id IN ('MAB-ID-CICIL', 'ATOME-ID-GOTO')
      AND status_name NOT IN ('REFUNDED', 'REFUND_REBALANCED', 'REBALANCED')
  )

, dpd AS (  --base_user
    SELECT pid
    , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 1, over_due_days >= 7, NULL) AS BIGINT))  m1dpd7
    , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 1, over_due_days >= 15, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m1dpd15
    , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 1, over_due_days >= 30, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m1dpd30
    , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 2, over_due_days >= 7, NULL) AS BIGINT))  m2dpd7
    , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 2, over_due_days >= 15, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m2dpd15
    , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 2, over_due_days >= 30, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m2dpd30
    , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 3, over_due_days >= 7, NULL) AS BIGINT))  m3dpd7
    , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 3, over_due_days >= 15, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m3dpd15
    , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 3, over_due_days >= 30, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m3dpd30
    , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 4, over_due_days >= 7, NULL) AS BIGINT))  m4dpd7
    , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 4, over_due_days >= 15, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m4dpd15
    , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 4, over_due_days >= 30, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m4dpd30
    FROM (
    SELECT
    a.pid
    , DATEDIFF(b.due_date, a.score_date, 'mm') AS performance_win_index
    , b.due_date
    , b.over_due_days
    , b.bill_principal
    , b.bill_status
    FROM base_user a
    LEFT JOIN gpl_due_bill b
    ON a.user_id = b.user_id AND a.score_date < b.due_date AND b.due_date <= DATEADD(a.score_date, 4, 'mm')
    )
    GROUP BY pid
)

, features AS (
SELECT
pid
-- mature internal model important features!!!
, historical_utilization_l1eom_all_avg_amt
, historical_utilization_l1eom_toko_avg_amt
, historical_months_since_last_loan
, historical_utilization_l1stm_all_avg_amt
, historical_balance_l1eom_all_avg_amt
, user_info_lower_education
, historical_utilization_l1eom_gojek_avg_amt
, user_info_age
, historical_utilization_l3eom_toko_avg_amt
, historical_gmv_l3m_all_sum_amt
-- young internal model important features!!!
, historical_gmv_l1m_phone_sum_amt
, historical_gmv_l1m_all_sum_amt
, historical_balance_l1eom_dg_avg_amt
, historical_repayment_is_currently_prepay
, historical_gmv_l1m_gojek_sum_amt
-- curren_dpd_internal model important features!!!
, historical_delinquent_current_dpd_days
, historical_utilization_l1stm_toko_avg_amt
, historical_delinquent_l1m_never_dq
, historical_gmv_l1m_toko_pct_amt
, historical_disburse_avg_tenor_l3m
, historical_delinquent_l3m_dpd30_ratio
, historical_balance_l1stm_toko_avg_amt
, historical_gmv_l2m_gojek_sum_amt
-- dormant_internal model important features!!!
, historical_delinquent_l3m_max_dpd
, historical_delinquent_l6m_max_dpd
, historical_utilization_l3eom_all_avg_amt
, historical_delinquent_l1m_max_dpd
, historical_balance_l1eom_toko_avg_amt
, historical_utilization_l3eom_pg_avg_amt
-- external model（cbi和mpv） important features!!!
, cbi_report_credit_max_hist_dpd_l12m_loans
, multi_head_v11_id_p2p_ratio_180d_360d
, cbi_report_credit_bnpl_worst_collectibility_6m
, cbi_report_credit_sum_latest_arr_amt_l12m_loans_excl_cc
, cbi_report_credit_cnt_ever_l6m_dpd_abv_dpd1_ratio_all_loans
, cbi_report_credit_sum_latest_os_amt_ratio_l12m_loans_excl_cc
, cbi_report_credit_max_hist_l6m_arrear_amt_all_loans
, cbi_report_credit_max_hist_l24m_arrear_amt_all_loans
, cbi_report_credit_avg_latest_arr_amt_l12m_loans_excl_cc
, multi_head_v11_id_other_ratio_90d_360d
, cbi_report_credit_max_hist_dpd_l24m_loans
, cbi_report_credit_length_of_file_in_month
, cbi_report_credit_avg_latest_os_amt_l12m_loans_excl_cc
, cbi_report_credit_avg_ongoing_monthly_repayment_amt_all_loans
, multi_head_v11_id_p2p_ratio_30d_180d
-- gopay model important features!!!
, gp_balance_avg_l90d
, gp_withdrawal_eff_balance_aft_min_amt_l90d
, gp_topup_median_interval_l90d
, gp_topup_trx_cnt_per_trx_day_l60d
, gp_balance_min_to_max_l30d_ratio
, gp_topup_stddev_amt_l90d
, gp_balance_stddev_l90d
, gp_withdrawal_min_amt_l90d
, gp_topup_sum_amt_l30d_to_l90d_ratio
, gp_topup_median_amt_l60d
-- mgr model important features!!!
, mgr_historical_delinquent_is_currently_dq
, mgr_historical_bill_max_dpd_l6m
, mgr_historical_utilization_max_l3m
, mgr_historical_bill_max_dpd_l3m
, mgr_historical_bill_dpd7_ratio_l3m
, mgr_historical_repayment_l6eom_prepay_ratio
, mgr_historical_order_avg_amount_l3m
, mgr_historical_repayment_l1eom_all_avg_amt
, mgr_historical_utilization_avg_l1m
, mgr_historical_repayment_l3eom_all_max_amt
-- fdc submodel important features！！！
, fdc_external_bad_loan_amt_pct_180d
, fdc_external_dpd_max_180d
, fdc_external_subtype_cashloan_loan_avg_amount_360d
, fdc_external_days_since_first_disbursed_ever_in_month
, fdc_external_loan_count_ever
, fdc_external_days_since_last_disbursed_360d
, fdc_external_max_installments_180d
, fdc_external_subtype_cashloan_loan_max_amount_360d
, fdc_external_subtype_cashloan_max_installments_360d
, fdc_external_subtype_cashloan_total_overdued_loan_amt_180d
FROM p_mab_id_ds_prd.customer_risk.m_cicil_b_score_v3_features
where _partition_value <= '2026-01-03' --DATEADD(date('{EXECUTION_DATE}'), -2, 'dd')
)

,integration AS ( --base_user
select
a.*
, CASE WHEN current_jkt_date < DATEADD(first_due_date, 30, 'dd') THEN NULL ELSE dpd.m1dpd30 END AS m1dpd30
, CASE WHEN current_jkt_date < DATEADD(second_due_date, 30, 'dd') THEN NULL ELSE dpd.m2dpd30 END AS m2dpd30
, CASE WHEN current_jkt_date < DATEADD(third_due_date, 30, 'dd') THEN NULL ELSE dpd.m3dpd30 END AS m3dpd30
, CASE WHEN current_jkt_date < DATEADD(fourth_due_date, 30, 'dd') THEN NULL ELSE dpd.m4dpd30 END AS m4dpd30
, s.* EXCEPT(pid)
, f.* EXCEPT(pid)
FROM base_user a
LEFT JOIN dpd ON a.pid = dpd.pid
LEFT JOIN subscores s ON a.pid = s.pid
LEFT JOIN features f ON a.pid = f.pid
)

SELECT
*
,case when user_segment='Mature' then score else null end as gpl_bscore_mature
,CASE WHEN user_segment = 'Dormant' THEN score ELSE NULL END AS gpl_bscore_dormant
,CASE WHEN user_segment = 'ANT' THEN score ELSE NULL END AS gpl_bscore_ant
,CASE WHEN user_segment = 'Current_DPD' THEN score ELSE NULL END AS gpl_bscore_current_dpd
,CASE WHEN user_segment = 'Young' THEN score ELSE NULL END AS gpl_bscore_young    
FROM integration

```

我当前sql是这样的：

```SQL
-- script-mode
SET odps.sql.submit.mode=script;
SET odps.sql.bigquery.compatible=true;
SET odps.sql.allow.cartesian=true;
SET odps.sql.groupby.orderby.position.alias=true;
SET odps.sql.allow.fullscan=true;


with base_user_org AS (
  SELECT
    pid
    , TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(score_timestamp_ts, 'Asia/Jakarta')) AS score_date
    , TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 'Asia/Jakarta')) AS current_jkt_date
    , DATEADD(DATETRUNC(TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(score_timestamp_ts, 'Asia/Jakarta')), 'mm'), 1, 'mm') AS first_due_date
    , DATEADD(DATETRUNC(TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(score_timestamp_ts, 'Asia/Jakarta')), 'mm'), 2, 'mm') AS second_due_date
    , DATEADD(DATETRUNC(TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(score_timestamp_ts, 'Asia/Jakarta')), 'mm'), 3, 'mm') AS third_due_date
    , DATEADD(DATETRUNC(TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(score_timestamp_ts, 'Asia/Jakarta')), 'mm'), 4, 'mm') AS fourth_due_date
    , user_id
    , hashed_ic_number
    , CASE WHEN mature_flag = 1 THEN 'Mature'
      WHEN young_flag = 1 THEN 'Young'
      WHEN ant_flag = 1 THEN 'ANT'
      WHEN current_dpd_flag = 1 THEN 'Current_DPD'
      WHEN dormant_flag = 1 THEN 'Dormant'
      END AS user_segment
    , score
    , proba
    , mature_internal_proba
    , young_internal_proba
    , current_dpd_internal_proba
    , dormant_internal_proba
    , external_proba
    , fdc_proba
    , gopay_proba
    , mgr_proba
  FROM p_mab_id_ds_prd.customer_risk.m_cicil_b_score_v3 a
  WHERE 
  _partition_value <= '2026-01-03' --DATEADD(date('{EXECUTION_DATE}'), -2, 'dd')
)

--抽取了10%的样本
,base_user as (
select
*
FROM 
    (
    SELECT
    *
    ,row_number() OVER (
                        PARTITION BY score_date, user_segment
                        ORDER BY rand(123) desc
                        ) AS rn

    ,count(1) OVER (
                    PARTITION BY score_date, user_segment
                   ) AS cnt
    FROM base_user_org
    ) r
WHERE 
rn <= cnt * 0.1
)

, subscores AS ( --base_user
SELECT pid
, CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_mature_internal_proba)/cap_mature_internal_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS mature_internal_subscore
, CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_young_internal_proba)/cap_young_internal_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS young_internal_subscore
, CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_current_dpd_internal_proba)/cap_current_dpd_internal_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS current_dpd_internal_subscore
, CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_dormant_internal_proba)/cap_dormant_internal_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS dormant_internal_subscore
, CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_external_proba)/cap_external_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS external_subscore
, CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_fdc_proba)/cap_fdc_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS fdc_subscore
, CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_mgr_proba)/cap_mgr_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS mgr_subscore
, CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_gopay_proba)/cap_gopay_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS gopay_subscore
FROM    (
        SELECT pid
            , LEAST(GREATEST(mature_internal_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_mature_internal_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(young_internal_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_young_internal_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(current_dpd_internal_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_current_dpd_internal_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(dormant_internal_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_dormant_internal_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(external_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_external_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(fdc_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_fdc_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(mgr_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_mgr_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(gopay_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_gopay_proba
        FROM base_user
        ) r
)

, bill_tracking AS (
    SELECT * EXCEPT (maximum_overdue_days_number)
          , CASE WHEN status_name = 'OVERDUE' THEN
        GREATEST(
            datediff(
                     TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 'Asia/Jakarta')),
                    TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(effective_due_timestamp, 'Asia/Jakarta'))
              ,'dd')
          , 0
        ) ELSE maximum_overdue_days_number END AS maximum_overdue_days_number
    FROM p_mab_id_mart.risk.detail_gtf_bill_tracking
  )

```


```SQL
, gpl_due_bill AS (
    SELECT user_id
         , TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(effective_due_timestamp, 'Asia/Jakarta'))      AS due_date
         , maximum_overdue_days_number  AS over_due_days
         , due_principal_amount AS bill_principal
         , status_name    AS bill_status
         , installment_number
         , created_jkt_date
    FROM bill_tracking l
    WHERE 1 = 1
      AND platform_id IN ('MAB-ID-CICIL', 'ATOME-ID-GOTO')
      AND status_name NOT IN ('REFUNDED', 'REFUND_REBALANCED', 'REBALANCED')
  )

, dpd AS (  --base_user
    SELECT pid
    , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 1, over_due_days >= 7, NULL) AS BIGINT))  m1dpd7
    , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 1, over_due_days >= 15, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m1dpd15
    , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 1, over_due_days >= 30, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m1dpd30
    , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 2, over_due_days >= 7, NULL) AS BIGINT))  m2dpd7
    , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 2, over_due_days >= 15, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m2dpd15
    , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 2, over_due_days >= 30, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m2dpd30
    , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 3, over_due_days >= 7, NULL) AS BIGINT))  m3dpd7
    , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 3, over_due_days >= 15, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m3dpd15
    , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 3, over_due_days >= 30, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m3dpd30
    , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 4, over_due_days >= 7, NULL) AS BIGINT))  m4dpd7
    , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 4, over_due_days >= 15, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m4dpd15
    , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 4, over_due_days >= 30, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m4dpd30
    FROM (
    SELECT
    a.pid
    , DATEDIFF(b.due_date, a.score_date, 'mm') AS performance_win_index
    , b.due_date
    , b.over_due_days
    , b.bill_principal
    , b.bill_status
    FROM base_user a
    LEFT JOIN gpl_due_bill b
    ON a.user_id = b.user_id AND a.score_date < b.due_date AND b.due_date <= DATEADD(a.score_date, 4, 'mm')
    )
    GROUP BY pid
)

, features AS (
SELECT
pid
-- mature internal model important features!!!
, historical_utilization_l1eom_all_avg_amt
, historical_utilization_l1eom_toko_avg_amt
, historical_months_since_last_loan
, historical_utilization_l1stm_all_avg_amt
, historical_balance_l1eom_all_avg_amt
, user_info_lower_education
, historical_utilization_l1eom_gojek_avg_amt
, user_info_age
, historical_utilization_l3eom_toko_avg_amt
, historical_gmv_l3m_all_sum_amt
-- young internal model important features!!!
, historical_gmv_l1m_phone_sum_amt
, historical_gmv_l1m_all_sum_amt
, historical_balance_l1eom_dg_avg_amt
, historical_repayment_is_currently_prepay
, historical_gmv_l1m_gojek_sum_amt
-- curren_dpd_internal model important features!!!
, historical_delinquent_current_dpd_days
, historical_utilization_l1stm_toko_avg_amt
, historical_delinquent_l1m_never_dq
, historical_gmv_l1m_toko_pct_amt
, historical_disburse_avg_tenor_l3m
, historical_delinquent_l3m_dpd30_ratio
, historical_balance_l1stm_toko_avg_amt
, historical_gmv_l2m_gojek_sum_amt
-- dormant_internal model important features!!!
, historical_delinquent_l3m_max_dpd
, historical_delinquent_l6m_max_dpd
, historical_utilization_l3eom_all_avg_amt
, historical_delinquent_l1m_max_dpd
, historical_balance_l1eom_toko_avg_amt
, historical_utilization_l3eom_pg_avg_amt
-- external model（cbi和mpv） important features!!!
, cbi_report_credit_max_hist_dpd_l12m_loans
, multi_head_v11_id_p2p_ratio_180d_360d
, cbi_report_credit_bnpl_worst_collectibility_6m
, cbi_report_credit_sum_latest_arr_amt_l12m_loans_excl_cc
, cbi_report_credit_cnt_ever_l6m_dpd_abv_dpd1_ratio_all_loans
, cbi_report_credit_sum_latest_os_amt_ratio_l12m_loans_excl_cc
, cbi_report_credit_max_hist_l6m_arrear_amt_all_loans
, cbi_report_credit_max_hist_l24m_arrear_amt_all_loans
, cbi_report_credit_avg_latest_arr_amt_l12m_loans_excl_cc
, multi_head_v11_id_other_ratio_90d_360d
, cbi_report_credit_max_hist_dpd_l24m_loans
, cbi_report_credit_length_of_file_in_month
, cbi_report_credit_avg_latest_os_amt_l12m_loans_excl_cc
, cbi_report_credit_avg_ongoing_monthly_repayment_amt_all_loans
, multi_head_v11_id_p2p_ratio_30d_180d
-- gopay model important features!!!
, gp_balance_avg_l90d
, gp_withdrawal_eff_balance_aft_min_amt_l90d
, gp_topup_median_interval_l90d
, gp_topup_trx_cnt_per_trx_day_l60d
, gp_balance_min_to_max_l30d_ratio
, gp_topup_stddev_amt_l90d
, gp_balance_stddev_l90d
, gp_withdrawal_min_amt_l90d
, gp_topup_sum_amt_l30d_to_l90d_ratio
, gp_topup_median_amt_l60d
-- mgr model important features!!!
, mgr_historical_delinquent_is_currently_dq
, mgr_historical_bill_max_dpd_l6m
, mgr_historical_utilization_max_l3m
, mgr_historical_bill_max_dpd_l3m
, mgr_historical_bill_dpd7_ratio_l3m
, mgr_historical_repayment_l6eom_prepay_ratio
, mgr_historical_order_avg_amount_l3m
, mgr_historical_repayment_l1eom_all_avg_amt
, mgr_historical_utilization_avg_l1m
, mgr_historical_repayment_l3eom_all_max_amt
-- fdc submodel important features！！！
, fdc_external_bad_loan_amt_pct_180d
, fdc_external_dpd_max_180d
, fdc_external_subtype_cashloan_loan_avg_amount_360d
, fdc_external_days_since_first_disbursed_ever_in_month
, fdc_external_loan_count_ever
, fdc_external_days_since_last_disbursed_360d
, fdc_external_max_installments_180d
, fdc_external_subtype_cashloan_loan_max_amount_360d
, fdc_external_subtype_cashloan_max_installments_360d
, fdc_external_subtype_cashloan_total_overdued_loan_amt_180d
FROM p_mab_id_ds_prd.customer_risk.m_cicil_b_score_v3_features
where _partition_value <= '2026-01-03' --DATEADD(date('{EXECUTION_DATE}'), -2, 'dd')
)

,integration AS ( --base_user
select
a.*
, CASE WHEN current_jkt_date < DATEADD(first_due_date, 30, 'dd') THEN NULL ELSE dpd.m1dpd30 END AS m1dpd30
, CASE WHEN current_jkt_date < DATEADD(second_due_date, 30, 'dd') THEN NULL ELSE dpd.m2dpd30 END AS m2dpd30
, CASE WHEN current_jkt_date < DATEADD(third_due_date, 30, 'dd') THEN NULL ELSE dpd.m3dpd30 END AS m3dpd30
, CASE WHEN current_jkt_date < DATEADD(fourth_due_date, 30, 'dd') THEN NULL ELSE dpd.m4dpd30 END AS m4dpd30
, s.* EXCEPT(pid)
, f.* EXCEPT(pid)
FROM base_user a
LEFT JOIN dpd ON a.pid = dpd.pid
LEFT JOIN subscores s ON a.pid = s.pid
LEFT JOIN features f ON a.pid = f.pid
)

SELECT
*
,case when user_segment='Mature' then score else null end as gpl_bscore_mature
,CASE WHEN user_segment = 'Dormant' THEN score ELSE NULL END AS gpl_bscore_dormant
,CASE WHEN user_segment = 'ANT' THEN score ELSE NULL END AS gpl_bscore_ant
,CASE WHEN user_segment = 'Current_DPD' THEN score ELSE NULL END AS gpl_bscore_current_dpd
,CASE WHEN user_segment = 'Young' THEN score ELSE NULL END AS gpl_bscore_young    
FROM integration

```
